category_sources: source_facts.description says iamy imports and exports AWS IAM configuration; official README describes managing AWS IAM configuration as infrastructure as code.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README at https://github.com/99designs/iamy uses the heading IAMy.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the primary documentation surface for IAMy.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/99designs/iamy, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and the official README describe AWS IAM import/export to YAML files for infrastructure-as-code workflows.
